problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
